global_visual_rules.style_direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Technical blueprint style with precise geometry, grid alignment, and engineering clarity. Dark background with luminous nodes.
must_have: ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure
flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy
layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art
section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid)
must_avoid: busy ornamental textures that reduce readability
style drift between cover and inline images
paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks

cover_image.purpose: Compress the article's main idea into one visual system that is understandable in one glance.
cover_image.concept_summary: 你早就训练自己不对 Siri 抱期望了。叫它帮你找上周和同事的邮件往来、顺手起草一条回复，它要么听不懂，要么给你打开 Safari 搜索框，要么干脆说"这我帮不到你"。重复三遍之后你放弃了，转头打开 ChatGPT。
scene_elements: one focal visual occupying roughly 60-70% area
icon-based metaphor instead of literal screenshots
clean title zone with breathing room
left-vs-right split board with one decisive divider
key_relationships: present one question and one promise
make the article worth clicking in one glance
make the core judgment visible within one glance
show one tension and one payoff only

on_canvas_text.headline: 苹果承认之前欠了你一个真正的
on_canvas_text.subheadline: 你早就训练自己不对 Siri

visual_constraints: prefer conceptual composition over decorative scene rendering
preserve warm off-white background and restrained accent colors
negative_constraints: do not mimic generic social banner aesthetics
avoid full-image text walls or dense annotation
cover_image.prompt_seed: Make this a hook-first cover. One question or tension, one promise, not a dense summary. Style profile: baoyu-cover-image: editorial-infographic (conceptual + warm + hand-drawn). Cover should feel like an editorial infographic hero image with calm hand-drawn confidence. Tech-blueprint: dark background, precise lines, neon-accent nodes, engineering diagram clarity. No hand-drawn wobble. Apply baoyu-cover-image preset editorial-infographic with conceptual composition. Apply hand-drawn organic line quality with controlled imperfection and clean hierarchy.…

inline_images.purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block.
inline_images.placement_rule: Insert near the start of framing to reset attention at this section transition.
scene_elements: two-column contrast with one takeaway strip
key_relationships: make the before/after or old/new contrast obvious
show why one example proves the point

on_canvas_text.headline: 你早就训练自己不对 S…

visual_constraints: maintain same house style as cover
support section transition and comprehension reset
negative_constraints: no decorative image blocks without structural meaning
inline_images.prompt_seed: Use the example_comparison grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 你早就训练自己不对 Siri 抱期望了。叫它帮你找上周… Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: knowledge-base (infographic + vector-illustration). Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value. Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: versus (comparison + vector-illustration). Use comparison-matrix thinking: align differences by one common axis.
